subcodes.first_line: O servant at the threshold of the All-Knowing Lord, be thou content and well-pleased, for thou art a manifestation of divine grace and a desert of love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان ایزد دانا خوشنود و خورسند باش که مظهر لطف خداوندی و صحرای عشق
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
